query: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.sector, c.supplierCosts FROM companies c WHERE c.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT companyId FROM supplyChainRisks WHERE expectedAnnualLoss IS NOT NULL AND expectedAnnualLoss != '' AND expectedAnnualLoss != '0') LIMIT 20
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ovDZf4AdgM1wjio.bac7ad92b374 --database Rur7xAEUjvByHVg3PaP3cz --execute SELECT c.id, c.name, c.sector, c.supplierCosts FROM companies c WHERE c.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT companyId FROM supplyChainRisks WHERE expectedAnnualLoss IS NOT NULL AND expectedAnnualLoss != '' AND expectedAnnualLoss != '0') LIMIT 20
